description_long: This is a modern outdoor bench featuring a seat and backrest made of horizontal wooden slats with a rich brown finish. The bench is supported by three robust, curved metal legs and armrests, which are painted in a light gray color, providing both stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The seat is divided into three sections by the metal supports, which also serve as partial armrests between the seating areas. The backrest is slightly reclined for ergonomic comfort and is constructed from matching wooden slats. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for public spaces such as parks, sidewalks, or plazas. The materials and construction suggest durability and resistance to outdoor elements.
description: A modern bench with brown wooden slats and curved gray metal supports, featuring a backrest and three seating sections. Its sturdy, contemporary design is ideal for outdoor public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bench, three seating sections, and the horizontal wooden slats with gray metal supports.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved metal leg and armrest, as well as the thickness of the wooden slats and the slight recline of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden backrest and the outer metal legs, with no visible seating divisions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the curved metal support and the profile of the seat and backrest.
